sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96035" key="spondeiasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδει-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in Music, <sense id="n96035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rise of pitch by an interval of three quarter-tones</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διέσεις</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.11</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1135a</biblScope></bibl>, b.</sense> </entryFree>
